core_mechanism: universal scaling at a continuous critical point governed by scale/conformal invariance: the entropy of a subsystem grows logarithmically with the subsystem's size with a prefactor fixed by the universality class (a central charge), and this coefficient decreases monotonically along the coarse-graining (renormalization-group) flow
brief_reason: The abstract reports that the entropy of the ground state traced down to L units scales logarithmically with L with a coefficient equal to the central charge of the conformal theory encoding the transition's universal properties, plus a monotonicity law for that quantity along the renormalization-group flow.
